## 1. Core Technology Stack 🛠️

Proyek ini menggunakan kombinasi teknologi *bleeding-edge* untuk performa dan skalabilitas maksimal.

| Category | Technology | Version | Note |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Framework** | Laravel | ^12.0 | High-performance backend. |
| **Language** | PHP | ^8.3 | Latest stable features. |
| **UI Engine** | Livewire | ^3.7 | Full-stack reactivity. |
| **Admin Panel** | Filament | ^4.7 | Server-driven UI. |
| **Styling** | Tailwind CSS | ^4.1 | V4 with PostCSS & Vite. |
| **Bundler** | Vite | ^8.0 | Instant HMR. |
| **AI Integration**| Gemini PHP | ^2.0 | LLM connectivity. |

## 2. Nexus Engine Architecture 🧠

Sistem otonom yang mengendalikan alur kerja dan memori proyek.

### 2.1 Agent Hierarchy
- **Core**: Assistant, Orchestrator, Project Manager (Workflow & Control).
- **Engineering**: Web Engineer, Responsive Specialist (Development).
- **Security**: Security Architect, Red/Blue Team (Protection).
- **Creative**: Branding & UX Specialist (Aesthetics).

### 2.2 Memory System

- **Long-term**: `nexus/memory/long_term/` (Institutional knowledge).

## 3. Structural Integrity & Security 🛡️

Audit teknis terhadap struktur dan keamanan sistem.

### 3.1 Security Hardening
- **Server Level**: `.htaccess` terkonfigurasi dengan HSTS, Secure Headers, dan proteksi file sensitif (`.env`, `.git`).
- **Application Level**: Terintegrasi dengan **Filament Shield** untuk manajemen Role & Permission (RBAC).
- **Environment**: Terisolasi dengan pemisahan yang jelas antara logika bisnis (`app/`) dan logika agen (`nexus/`).

### 3.2 Documentation Maturity
Proyek mematuhi **External Boundary v2 Protocol**:
- ✅ **Planning**: Terpusat di `documentation/planning/`.
- ✅ **Knowledge**: Institutionalized di `documentation/knowledge/`.
- ✅ **Audit**: Kualitas dijaga melalui `documentation/audit/`.
